# Credits {.unnumbered}

The framework at the centre of this book, `zzcollab`, and
the argument that motivates it are developed in the
accompanying methodological paper, *zzcollab: A Flexible
Extension of rrtools for Reproducible, Collaborative
Research Compendia in R*. The book draws its worked
apparatus, its reproducibility-levels ladder, and its
capture-versus-validation framing from that work and from
the framework's documentation.

The book stands on the shoulders of the reproducibility
literature it surveys, in particular the research-compendium
lineage of Gentleman and Temple Lang and of Marwick,
Boettiger, and Mullen; the containerisation work of the
Rocker project; and the many rules-and-practices papers
cited in the chapters.

Cover artwork palette anchored on a verification teal
`#14746f`. Typography follows the sequence house style:
body text in a serif face, code in a monospace face.
